identity.lead_description: One persistent armored king or knight overlay remains fixed near the lower center throughout the short.

wardrobe.change_policy: The foreground knight asset is locked as a single cutout rather than changing wardrobe across scenes.
locked_relationships: the same armored king overlay persists across all scene phases

scene_signatures: warm fantasy sky and horizon plates
background.change_policy: Backgrounds are swappable input media as long as they retain the cinematic fantasy palette.

composition.camera: static landscape composition with lower-center foreground cutout
composition.framing: single-word caption centered around the upper-middle while the foreground figure anchors the bottom center
composition.look: editorial quote reel using scenic image plates, one persistent cutout, and one-word text reveals

text.pattern: one centered serif word at a time

global: subtle ambient zoom on image plates

scene_overrides.motion_intent: black top and bottom panels open from the center to reveal the first background plate
words fade in over slow-moving scenic image plates
continue word cadence while scenic plates crossfade through darker fantasy art
close with the same cadence over final warm forest backgrounds

notes: This package routes to Remotion because the reusable value lies in code-driven text timing and transition logic rather than provider-generated video clips.
Source-derived image plates and one transparent foreground cutout are treated as editable input media.
